changelog: Continue Watching: Pressing BACK during a movie or series now asks "Are you done watching?" — pick Yes to clear the title from your list, or No to save your place and resume later. Live TV BACK keeps its existing single/double-press behaviour.
Continue Watching: A new "Clear All" tile sits at the end of the row so you can wipe every in-progress title at once. Confirmation dialog defaults to Cancel so you never wipe by accident.

Continue Watching: Removing a title now propagates across every device signed in to the same playlist (tombstone-based sync). The deletion shows up on your Fire Stick, your phone, and any other paired device on the next 30-second sync cycle.
Continue Watching: Anything you haven't touched in 14 days is automatically pruned from the list — keeps the row focused on what you actually still want to finish.
Continue Watching: The Home page now lands on the Continue Watching tile automatically whenever you have something in progress. First card focused, ready to resume.
